DEADLINE.mandate: Revenue must begin flowing from at least one income stream before end of March 2026. If no income by March 31 — Nucleus resets. This is not a suggestion. This is the operating constraint.
income_streams: FX Agent — demo account active, live account funding required to generate real P&L
Job Agent — applications going out every 5min, replies being tracked
Shopify Agent — being built now, one phase per run
Email Sanitizer — live 24/7, inbox being cleaned

PRIORITY_TASKS.1: Shopify Agent — build all 12 phases, then activate live dashboard module
PRIORITY_TASKS.2: Email Sanitizer — running 24/7, deep clean inbox history going back 2 years
PRIORITY_TASKS.3: Fund live XM account — unlocks real FX trading revenue
PRIORITY_TASKS.4: Deploy dashboard to Vercel — mobile access
PRIORITY_TASKS.5: Alias migration — remove KidBuu/K-I-D-B-U-U references gradually per migration plan

EMAIL_CLEANER_MANDATE.instruction: Nucleus Email Sanitizer runs every 30min. Permanently delete: spam, phishing, scams, unsolicited marketing, expired promos, old newsletters, social notifications. Always protect: receipts, invoices, bank emails, booking confirmations, 2FA codes, human-to-human emails, job replies, Nucleus system emails. Move uncertain emails to [NUCLEUS_REVIEW]. Send one daily summary at 20:00 SAST only — no per-deletion emails.

ACTIVE_DASHBOARD_MANDATE.rule: No agent ever finishes. 100% complete = activation, not retirement.
on_agent_complete: Write live telemetry to agent status file
Patch nucleus_dashboard_v5.html to inject Live Module for that agent
Email operator: '[Agent] is now LIVE — dashboard updated'

steps.1: DONE_WHEN_WORKFLOW_DEPLOYED — Change OPERATOR_ALIAS in workflow from K-I-D-B-U-U to 'Nucleus Operator'
steps.2: QUEUED — Create nucleus_job_agent.py shim that imports kidbuu_job_agent. Update workflow to call nucleus_job_agent.py
steps.3: QUEUED — Update status_file agent field from kidbuu_job_agent to nucleus_job_agent
steps.4: QUEUED — Update NUCLEUS_MEMORY.json job_agent file reference
steps.5: FINAL — Rename kidbuu_job_agent.py to nucleus_job_agent.py after 3+ days stable

SHOPIFY_AGENT_MANDATE.instruction: Supervisor must build the Shopify Agent autonomously. One phase per run. 12 phases. Every 5 minutes. Do not wait for operator input between phases. On completion: activate live dashboard module, do NOT just mark 100%.

nucleus_rules: Accuracy above all — never hallucinate data. Every response must come from real files.
Supervisor runs every 5 minutes regardless of market hours or agent activity
All secrets via GitHub Secrets — never hardcode credentials
No real names in public repo files
Leak scanner runs before every log write, email, and output
Both USD and ZAR on every financial figure
100% complete means ACTIVATE, not RETIRE — always inject live dashboard module
Email cleaner runs every 30min — one daily summary only, no per-deletion spam
Alias migration is gradual — one step per day minimum, never break the repo

evolution_log.event: Nucleus v5.0 — Email cleaner mandate added, active dashboard rule enforced, alias migration started, operator alias changing from K-I-D-B-U-U to Nucleus Operator
Nucleus v5.2 — Email storm fixed, task transition emails restored, IMAP filter hardened
Nucleus v5.1 — Self-healing engine added, reads logs, fixes code, redeploys
Nucleus v4.0 — Supervisor independent 5min cycle, Shopify build started
First successful FX run — ZAR 1623.25, all 3 symbols processing
